/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest.so -o libgtest.so "CMakeFiles/gtest.dir/src/gtest-all.cc.o"   -L/root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_kits/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src  -Wl,-rpath,/root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_ros_kits/build/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -lpthread
